task.title: Changing the Power Off Timer Setting from the Control Panel
task.shortdesc: You can use the product's control panel to change the time period before the printer

context.p: You can use the product's control panel to change the time period before the printer turns off automatically.

step.cmd: Press the home button, if necessary.
Select Settings> Printer Setup> Power Off Timer.
Select the length of time after which you want the product to automatically turn off when it is not in use. Then press the OKbutton.
Press the home button to exit.
